programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Physical Attraction...Chemical Reaction
programme.desc: George and Izzie's romantic chemistry is put to the test; Derek asks for more from Meredith; Mark develops a crush on a fellow surgeon and Callie's role as Chief Resident is placed in jeopardy after she delegates much of her job to Bailey.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Forever Young
programme.desc: After a tragic school bus crash, the hospital is flooded with teenage patients. Meanwhile, Bailey treats a patient who was her high school crush, Derek dates a fellow doctor, and Thatcher arrives at the ER looking for Meredith.

programme.title: The Closer: The Life
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a 12-year-old boy found dead in a known gang party house. The case is soon complicated when two more bodies are found at a different yet related house. Meanwhile, trouble brews in Provenza's romantic paradise.

programme.title: The Closer: Make Over
programme.desc: Several old cases that were previously closed are suddenly re-opened after a crime lab is discredited. Provenza's former partner, Det. Andrews, comes out of retirement to help with a case involving artwork theft and murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Citizen's Arrest
programme.desc: In a case involving a kidnapping-turned-homicide, the squad is pressured to work quickly. Meanwhile, DNA evidence proves that Rusty has a close tie to the justice system.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Out of Bounds
programme.desc: When a fatal shooting occurs in gang territory, Capt. Raynor makes a bold move that could jeopardize her career. Rusty claims that he doesn't care to meet his biological father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Shame Game
programme.desc: Major Crimes struggles to keep important documents from leaking. A situation proves extremely uncomfortable for Capt. Raydor, when the Department of Children and Family Services tracks down Rusty's biological father.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: But I Am a Good Girl
programme.desc: TJ's christening turns grim when a body is discovered in the church. Jane almost abuses her power in order to protect Tommy when Lydia's fiancé threatens to take custody of TJ.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Golden State Killer Theories
programme.desc: Investigators analyze the evidence and explore the various theories as to who they thought this ruthless barbarian could be.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Closing in on the Golden State Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Unmasking a Killer: Closing in on the Golden State Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Hear from those who knew him and the investigators who spent a lifetime tracking him down.

programme.title: Down the Hill: The Delphi Murders: Part 1
programme.desc: The gruesome murder of two young girls rocked the small town of Delphi, Indiana. Four years later, despite audio and video of the alleged killer, the case remains open.

programme.title: Down the Hill: The Delphi Murders: Part 2
programme.desc: A brutal crime in the heart of America - two young girls murdered in plain sight. With a killer still on the loose, the community wants answers.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: One October: Massacre on the Strip
programme.desc: Stephen Paddock lived the lifestyle of the rich and famous in Las Vegas. Gambling up to $1M a day, he was known as a ‘whale.’ But a trip to Vegas in October, 2017 leaves 58 dead.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Chained by a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Prominent realtor Todd Kohlhepp’s double life is exposed when police launch a dramatic rescue – all caught on body camera – of a young woman chained like a dog inside a shipping container on his property.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying
programme.desc: Lululemon employee Jayna Murray is found stabbed to death inside one of the company’s Washington, DC stores. Her co-worker is bound and bleeding in a room. As different suspects emerge, evidence starts to point to someone on the inside.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert & The Rattlesnakes
programme.desc: Robert wrangles Western Diamondback rattlesnakes in Arizona for the first time, learning techniques.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi Says Yes!
programme.desc: As Bindi celebrates her 21st birthday, she gets a surprise proposal from her boyfriend, Chandler. Meanwhile, things get dangerous as Robert wrangles gators in thick mud. Terri helps with the momentous birth of a baby white rhino.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Wedding
programme.desc: Bindi and Chandler prepare for the happiest day of their lives. Weeks before their wedding day, the coronavirus pandemic causes them to make difficult and drastic changes to the wedding of their dreams, but in the end love prevails.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: discovery+ 1st Look: New Start
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the re-opening of the zoo. Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Alligator Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Robert feeds 44 hungry alligators, all at the same time. Terri helps examine Kaitlynn the tiger and makes a thrilling discovery, while Bindi follows the heartbreaking story of her old friends, Zambezi the Zebra.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: discovery+ 1st Look: New Start
programme.desc: After weeks of being closed due to the global pandemic, the Irwins race to prepare for the re-opening of the zoo. Robert helps deliver a litter of newborn tiger cubs, while Bindi handles a sudden crisis at the wildlife hospital.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Salt Flat Rod
programme.desc: A hot rod lover from California challenges Steve to transform a 1931 Ford Model A into a salt flats racing machine, but getting it done before his client returns to Vegas will take a miracle.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Ranch Rod
programme.desc: Steve digs back into his Montana roots to build his cowboy buddy J.R. the ultimate ranch-rod by Frankenstein-ing together a pair of vintage Dodge trucks.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Fruit Rod
programme.desc: When a California fruit farmer with a taste for hot rods asks Steve for a 1954 GMC COE truck he decides to take it over the top; with a 1200-horsepower engine mounted behind the cab, the crew begin their love affair with the baddest truck ever made.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Mack Rod
programme.desc: Guns and gators are on the menu when a Texan house mover brings Steve his family treasure: a 1938 Big Rig Mack Truck cab that's one step from the grave.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Electro Rod
programme.desc: When a client brings Steve a 1928 Buick filled with rotten wood, his excitement at rat-rodding an original 'gangster' car soon fades when he learns his client wants it to be an electric car.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Pickup Rod
programme.desc: Steve yanks a 1949 Ford F1 out of a farmer's field and battles to transform it into an eye-popping promotional vehicle with a cowboy-biker theme for a couple of his dad's old friends.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: Bracket two race kicks off with sixteen new drivers, including No Prep King Champ Ryan Martin and Memphis leader JJ The Boss. A fresh section of road challenges every driver to put down his fast pass.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Gimme the Loot
programme.desc: It's not over for the 12 racers who lost in bracket 2, and tonight, they're fighting to stay alive in the competition. Having to race over and over is tearing some cars apart, and racers must try not to lose before they even get to the starting line.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: Paid in Full
programme.desc: Mega Cash Days continues into Bracket 3 and all eyes are on Big Chief and Daddy Dave who are lining up in Round 1. Chief has never been able to beat Dave in a Cash Days and tonight he's trying to break the curse.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Melissa M's Story
programme.desc: Melissa has isolated herself at home and lost many friends to avoid feeling the shame of what her food addiction has done to her body. Now, the only way to get her life back is to leave it behind to start a new one with Dr. Now's help in Houston.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Being Strong or Being a Bitch
programme.desc: Janelle gathers Kody and the wives to talk about their increasingly tense family dynamic. Kody gets honest and says he doesn't want to advocate for polygamy anymore, and Robyn and Christine open up about their own insecurities as they question everything.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: Mike and Natalie try therapy. Jovi's dad questions Yara. Tarik and Hazel worry about Harrey. Stephanie upsets Ryan with her psychic's prediction. Andrew has another plan. Rebecca is jealous when Zied gets female attention.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Three's a Party
programme.desc: Julia thinks she's pregnant. Stephanie and Ryan have an explosive fight. Natalie demands answers. Jovi upsets Yara at their engagement party. Rebecca worries that Zied will change his mind. Tarik and Hazel pursue finding a girlfriend.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Felons No More
programme.desc: The Browns visit their polygamist friends to discuss the sudden and exciting possibility that polygamy will be decriminalized in Utah. The car trip to get there is a mess, but once there, the excitement is palpable.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: discovery+ 1st Look: 90 Day: The Single Life
programme.desc: A first look at the new 90 Day series, '90 Days: The Single Life.'

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Three's a Party

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: discovery+ 1st Look: 90 Day: The Single Life

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: It's Time to Start Seeking Again!
programme.desc: The Snowdens and the Alldredges are both courting a new sister wife. We meet the Winders, who are young newlyweds living plural marriage in secret. We also meet the McGees who are looking for their first sister wife.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Vanessa experiences life as a Snowden during her visit. The McGees tell their sons they want to seek a sister wife again. The Winders go out in public as a trio for the first time.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Vacation: Impossible
programme.desc: As major construction begins on their house, Courtney and Eric decide to take their first family vacation with the sextuplets. But between baby and big boy meltdowns, they struggle to keep everyone happy at the same time.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Family Under Construction
programme.desc: Courtney is worried about the sextuplets' speech and enrolls them in various baby classes, which also helps get them out of the house and away from construction mishaps. To thank Eric for all he does, Courtney and the big boys plan an appreciation day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Nothing Ordinary Here
programme.desc: Erin wants a blue dress for her destination wedding, but she must first convince her skeptical entourage. Kate is in search of a unique dress that incorporates colour. Heather's entourage is shocked when she proudly shows off her flower-patterned gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Chart Topping Dress
programme.desc: Country star Whitney Duncan needs a dress that, like her, commands centre stage. Rock girl Chic wants a gown that is hot, sexy and beautiful. Songwriter Kiirsten is nervous for her fitting, but should be more worried about her veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Kleinfeld Family Affair
programme.desc: Carolina is an editor for 'Say Yes' and is seeking the Kleinfeld experience first-hand. Danielle, close family friend of Dorothy, has a very special surprise in store. Consultant Katie is delighted to turn customer for the day.

programme.title: Unexpected: Kids Having Kids
programme.desc: A pregnant Jenna wants a car for her birthday. Myrka's mom kicked her out for getting pregnant. Soon-to-be-grandma Jessica tries to salvage the relationship between teens Reanna and Taron. Tyra leaves Alex and Layla behind at home as she heads to college.

programme.title: Unexpected: Worst. Birthday. EVER.
programme.desc: Jenna only wanted one thing for her birthday: a car. Away at college, Tyra receives devastating news. Taron and Reanna accuse each other of cheating weeks before she is due. Myrka and Ethan get an ultrasound, but no one gets to know the baby's gender yet.

programme.title: Unexpected: Invitation to the Gender Reveal
programme.desc: Jessica worries Reanna may be going into early labor. Tyra is furious that Julie's internet boyfriend has moved in. Myrka invites her mom to her gender reveal party. Jenna refuses to move her pet rabbit's cage to make room for a new crib.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call
programme.desc: Tammy and Amy blame each other for their issues in therapy. When Tammy gets devastating news from Dr. Procter, her brother Chris makes a life-altering decision. A very pregnant Amy can't stop overeating, and the results are disastrous.

programme.desc: Booters Steve and Sherry are on the hunt for a missing booted vehicle, while best friends Brian and Lori shake it up on their ticketing beat. Rob deals with the angry owner of an impounded car who claims it's been damaged.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Tiffany, nicknamed 'swoop' for her ticketing instincts, shows off her techniques. Meanwhile, ladies man Martin is called to tow a car that crashed into a gas pump.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Yolanda has her hands full trying to help the owner of a tricked-out pink truck through the red tape to get it back. John faces a car owner who tries to lock him out, and Marilyn makes both friends and enemies on her new beat.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Deja Vu/ Secret in the Well
programme.desc: A fingerprint identification system helps solve a murder; a 16-year-old murder is solved when the victim's body is found at the bottom of a well.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Abandoned Houses/ A Son's Memory
programme.desc: Detectives are baffled when two young girls are raped, murdered and dumped in an abandoned house in Akron, Ohio. A 26-year-old mother of three disappears on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Knock at the Door/ Shattered
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a Virginia hotel room goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are able to zero in on the likely killer. A 25-year-old woman is shot to death during a jewellery store robbery.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Caught on Camera II
programme.desc: Take a look back at three cases in Tulsa and Atlanta that were solved because they were caught on camera.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Women of Homicide
programme.desc: Four of The First 48's female homicide detectives are highlighted in condensed stories in Memphis, Cincinnati, Tulsa and Atlanta.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee
programme.desc: The three chefs make recreations of McDonald's Sausage McMuffin with egg for Bobby Lee.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: Modern Family: Election Day
programme.desc: The entire family rallies for some last minute campaigning on Election Day. Mitch and Cam ride around in a 'Vote for Claire' mobile, the Dunphy home becomes campaign central with everyone manning the phones, and Claire does some last-minute interviews.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Price You Pay
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kylie's 18th birthday gives Kris a reason to meet Caitlyn for the first time. History repeats itself as Kim takes over Kris' home in preparation for baby number two. Khloé takes steps to move forward.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts
programme.desc: After finally choosing to move forward with her divorce, Khloé seeks solace in Mexico City at the big cat rescue foundation, Black Jaguar White Tiger. Meanwhile, Kris complicates matters by carrying on her own separate correspondence with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The family flies to St. Bart's to forget their troubles, but drama has a way of following them. Kourtney is distracted when she gets disturbing news about Scott and Kendall has beef with Kylie for bring her boyfriend Tyga.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Deadly Spill
programme.desc: In Texas, Ataya and Wood must handle young jet skiers bending the rules, and Warden McGee investigates a major gasoline spill. Meanwhile, Wardens Boone and Noxon come to the rescue of a boater stranded on the Trinity River.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparking Disaster
programme.desc: During wildfire season, Game Warden Dustin Delgado catches people throwing out lit cigarettes and stops them in their tracks. Game Warden Cynde Aguilar helps hunt down the criminal of a high-speed chase, and a call is made about a gator lurking in a pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Rattled
programme.desc: In Jasper County, Game Warden Boone responds to a venomous rattlesnake. Game wardens investigate the illegal killing of a goose in the Texas Panhandle. In South Texas, Game Wardens follow up on a tip about a man going over the fishing limit.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparking Disaster
programme.desc: During wildfire season, Game Warden Dustin Delgado catches people throwing out lit cigarettes and stops them in their tracks. Game Warden Cynde Aguilar helps hunt down the criminal of a high-speed chase, and a call is made about a gator lurking in a pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Deadly Spill
programme.desc: In Texas, Ataya and Wood must handle young jet skiers bending the rules, and Warden McGee investigates a major gasoline spill. Meanwhile, Wardens Boone and Noxon come to the rescue of a boater stranded on the Trinity River.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies and a Piggy
programme.desc: Goldendoodles take over the house, 12 of them, and later, batch of Swiss Mountain pups take a while to find their stride.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Pee Battle
programme.desc: A mother daughter duo’s lovable cats are having a territorial pissing match that's destroying not only their furniture but also their relationship. The cat daddy connects with cat from heaven, Ziggy, who has CPR skills.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sloth Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Sloths Tina and Rico live together at the zoo, spending up to 18 hours a day asleep. For the past three years, Tina has spent her waking moments giving Rico a hard time. Now there's a plan to try and bring them closer together.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Coolest Treehouse Ever Built
programme.desc: Pete and the team tackle a treehouse for two tastemakers in Maine. Featuring a full wall of windows that opens up to the outdoors and a towering rooftop crow's-nest, this could be Pete's coolest treehouse ever built.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Winds of Trade
programme.desc: Renowned sea life painter Guy Harvey asks the crew to build their largest tank to date for the Trade Winds Resort in St. Pete Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Street Dog Named Desire
programme.desc: When a reputed dog napper dumps a dog at Villalobos, Mariah scrambles to find the owner. A new parolee needs Tia's help when he realizes he is in over his head. And, after having her last adoption fall through, Smack has a second chance at a loving home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Incomparable Dr. K
programme.desc: An outbreak of disease in the swamps threatens the dogs,Tania goes out on her own to save a stray pit from the streets and is faced with a difficult rescue, and after years of waiting for a forever home, Jackson finally gets his shot.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Movie: Traffik
programme.desc: A couple heads to a secluded home in the mountains for a romantic getaway, but after a run-in with a group of bikers at a gas station the lovers find themselves under siege. Far from help and alone in the wilderness, they fight for their lives.

programme.title: Movie: Detroit
programme.desc: After a police raid on an illegal bar set off the deadly 1967 Detroit riot, shots are heard coming from the Algiers Motel. When police, National Guardsmen and a private security guard respond three black men end up dead and several civilians are beaten.

programme.title: Boiling Point: L.A. Riots
programme.desc: The acquittal of four officers in the Rodney King beating trial that lit a firestorm of unrest and rang the alarm on a troubling history of excessive force by police.

programme.title: Disrupt and Dismantle: Shingle Mountain
programme.desc: Soledad meets a grandmother who's fighting to get a mountain of toxic shingles removed from the lot behind her house. In the process, she uncovers a widespread yet rarely-talked-about problem in Dallas, Texas: environmental racism.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Three)
programme.desc: Realizing he made a mistake, Martin tries to win Gina back.

programme.title: Martin: Credit Card Blues
programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.title: Martin: Jerome's in the House
programme.desc: Unhappy with being dumped, Pam decides to go on a date with Jerome.

programme.title: The Parkers: Quarantine
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim's vacation in Mexico is ruined when they are kicked out of the country.

programme.title: The Parkers: And the Band Plays On
programme.desc: Kim's feathers are ruffled when T invites a beautiful Latin singer to join the band.

programme.title: The Parkers: Betting on Love
programme.desc: Nikki's ex-fiance walks back into her life with a promise to give up his gambling habit.

programme.title: The Parkers: It's a Family Affair

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mystery on Runestone Hill
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard begin a brand-new excavation at the mysterious Runestone Hill; what they find could change the course of their investigation.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Discovery on the Edge
programme.desc: Bringing scholars and skeptics together to solve the mystery of the Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard gain access to runestone samples for the forensic geologist to conduct testing, and they meet with an archaeo-physics team that finds metal artifacts buried at the site where the runestone was discovered.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mystery on Runestone Hill
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard begin a brand-new excavation at the mysterious Runestone Hill; what they find could change the course of their investigation.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.desc: After a vulnerable elderly man is brutalized in his rural home, John joins a thrilling manhunt for Derek Whisenand. And when newlywed bliss turns into a vicious crime, Cal goes boots on the ground on the trail of fugitive Arnoldo Jimenez.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is savagely murdered while fishing along the Platte River.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lord of the Rockies
programme.desc: Residents of Guffey, Colorado cherish their tiny mountain outpost for one reason - the peaceful Rocky Mountain surroundings. That peace is shattered one January night when Carl and JoAnna Dutcher are massacred alongside their grandson, Tony.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: A Deadly Dream
programme.desc: A beloved small town city worker is gunned down at work.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Mystery, Heartbreak and Justice
programme.desc: Many stories don't end when the jury delivers its verdict. Three amazing cases where the quest for justice rages on.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In The Dead of Night
programme.desc: Police must retrace a teenager's last known movements if they hope to find out when and where she crossed paths with her killer.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Night Crawlers
programme.desc: A Southern California college freshman is gunned down in her family's home, and her older sister won't rest until she finds the people responsible.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Blood Mountain
programme.desc: Meredith Emerson decides to celebrate the new year by hiking on Georgia's Blood Mountain with her dog, Ella. When Meredith goes missing and Ella is found 60 miles away, an all-out search begins.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Kill Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: It's a brutal scene when Karen Gregory is raped and stabbed in her boyfriend's Florida home. Detective Larry Tosi enlists the help of his firefighter friend to solve the crime. What comes next is something no detective wants to hear.

programme.title: The 1990s: The Deadliest Decade: Soldier of Misfortune
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Dog Days of Murder
programme.desc: When Billings, Montana firefighters respond to a duplex consumed in flames, two bound and gagged bodies are found inside. With their housemate nowhere to be found, police aren't sure if they're searching for the killer or another victim.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Revenge With a Bullet
programme.desc: After motorists spot a man's body burning on the side of the highway, investigators find evidence of a brutal assassination and fiery cover-up. Detectives decode construction debris with curious details to reveal a scheme that ended in murder.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: A Barnwood Miracle
programme.desc: The Mt. Olivet Church has been the heart of Pocahontas County, WV for 137 years. The old log structure is struggling to survive, so Mark and the guys are called in to take it down and restore it. As the job ends, the community pulls off a surprise ending.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Log Cabin Dream Come True
programme.desc: Tammy Harrah and her late husband dreamed of running a craft store in a log cabin on their West Virginia family homestead. The guys make this dream come true for her and her son building a cabin for them and making some homemade crafts for the store.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Doubleheader
programme.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time. Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Chicago, IL
programme.desc: Casey travels to Chicago for some epic Windy City eats, including a massive triple-threat pork sandwich and a challenge featuring a two-pound double bacon cheeseburger and two pounds of 'Irish Nacho' cheese fries.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fit for a King
programme.desc: Eddie tries over the top dishes kit for a king.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Fever/ Chum Caverns
programme.desc: Squidward gets stuck indoors with SpongeBob and Patrick during a storm. Plankton creates an underground restaurant that threatens to put the Krusty Krab out of business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Super Evil Aquatic Villain Team Up Is Go/ Chum FRICASSee
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then-the world! Hahahahahaha!

programme.title: The Loud House: Left in the Dark/ Get the Message
programme.desc: Lincoln races his siblings to the couch in order to watch his favourite TV show. Lincoln must delete an angry voicemail from Lori's phone so she doesn't hear it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Fungus Humungous
programme.desc: A fungus mutant spreading through the sewers causes the Turtles and April to experience their worst fears as Leonardo must face his greatest fear-losing his team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead Rewired
programme.desc: When Donnie upgrades Metalhead's artificial intelligence, he must decide if he can trust a sentient Metalhead or if he has created a new foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Of Rats and Men
programme.desc: When the Rat King returns, Splinter must overcome his guilt and fear of the Rat King controlling his mind in order to defeat his foe once and for all.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wormquake!
programme.desc: Facing Shredder's deadly new assassin, Leo must decide whether to risk his brother's lives or ask for Splinter's help. Donnie must put aside his rivalry with Casey in order to uncover a new Kraang plot.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mazes and Mutants
programme.desc: The Turtles try to relax by playing a fantasy role-playing game, but when the game becomes real, the must learn the difference between fantasy and reality.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Lonely Mutation of Baxter Stockman
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman kidnaps and threatens to mutate April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Newtralized!
programme.desc: Raphael is worried about Casey's ability to handle big mutant threats when they meet Slash again and discover he has a partner of his own: The Newtralizer!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Wrath of Tiger Claw
programme.desc: Tiger Claw returns and sets out to destroy the Ninja Turtles at any cost.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Pizza Face
programme.desc: Mikey discovers that a new mutant is trying to attack and capture people using living pizzas, but he struggles to convince the others who don't believe him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Legend of Kuro Kabuto
programme.desc: Leo, worried about Karai, tries to convince the others to rescue her, while a master thief steals Shredder's helmet, and it falls into the Turtles' unsuspecting hands.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Slime and Pirates!
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star Comes to Earth/ Party With a Pony
programme.desc: Fun-loving magical teen princess, Star Butterfly, who after a few skirmishes with other-worldly monsters, is sent by her Royal Parents to live with the Diaz family on Earth, bringing along her own unique inter-dimensional style to her new planet.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Freeze Day/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: Star accidentally freezes time with her wand, so she and Marco must travel to the Plains of Time to convince Father Time to get back on his time wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star on Wheels/ Fetch
programme.desc: When Marco teaches Star how to ride a bike but forgets to tell her about brakes, he teams up with Oskar and Glossaryck to save her. A mysterious stray dog steals Star's wand and refuses give it back.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starsitting/ On the Job
programme.desc: When Star and Marco are in charge of watching Buffrog's tadpoles, the duo's babysitting styles clash. Later, Buffrog has to complete an important mission in order to care for his kids.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Friendenemies/ Is Mystery
programme.desc: When Tom vies for Marco's company instead of Star's, Marco becomes suspicious. Later, worried about his tadpoles' futures, Buff Frog investigates the hole in the Mewman force field.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Bon Bon the Birthday Clown
programme.desc: Star has second thoughts about attending a dead clown's séance, when Jackie asks Marco to go to the school dance with him.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: NFL 360: Tomlinson
programme.desc: The story behind LaDainian Tomlinson's powerful Hall of Fame Enshrinement speech, focusing on the Tomlinson family roots and how slavery shaped his own personal history in one of the most-talked about enshrinement speeches of all time.

programme.title: Orangeburg: A Town, a Team, an American Tragedy
programme.desc: The story of the 1968 protests for racial equality on the campus of South Carolina State that turned deadly, forever being known as the Orangeburg Massacre.

programme.title: Top 10: HBCU Players

programme.title: NFL Roundtables: Field Generals
programme.desc: Trailblazing quarterbacks Doug Williams, James Harris, Warren Moon and Michael Vick sit down and discuss their hardships and triumphs of being a black quarterback in the NFL.

programme.title: NFL 360: Fritz Pollard: A Forgotten Man
programme.desc: NFL 360 pays tribute to Fritz Pollard, one of pro football's first black players and its first black head coach. Pollard integrated the fledgling NFL a century ago, winning its inaugural title before a wave of segregation cast him aside.

programme.title: NFL Total Access: Say Their Stories
programme.desc: Conversations with players and family members of police violence, along with discussions about the stories and the actions the league has taken collectively to address social injustices.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, a physician-turned-murderer left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next
programme.desc: Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed this once-trusted physician-turned-killer from hospital to hospital for nearly two decades and across two continents.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair
